tagline: Clean and Clear Pools — Enjoy Your Pool Without Worrying About Your Pool

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Always Ready Without
the Worry
hero.subheadline: Blue Pelican Pools handles every detail of your weekly pool care so you can skip the chemicals and dive straight in. After every visit, you get a full report with photos, readings, and exactly what was done.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care So You<br class="hidden md:block"> Can Just Enjoy the Water
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to equipment repairs, Blue Pelican Pools keeps your backyard oasis crystal clear and swim-ready all year long.

cards.title: Weekly Pool & Spa Service
cards.description: Chemical balancing, brushing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks every single week. Plus a detailed email report with photos after every visit.

cards.title: Equipment Inspection & Repairs
cards.description: We check your pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems at every visit. If something needs fixing, we handle it in-house with an upfront quote.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Pool turned swamp-green while you were away? We will have it sparkling and swim-ready within 48 to 72 hours. Emergency calls welcome.

cards.title: Chemical Treatment & Balancing
cards.description: Precise weekly balancing of chlorine, acids, soda ash, and conditioner to keep your water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No guesswork.

cards.title: Filter & Equipment Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough cleaning of filters, salt cells, and specialty equipment to extend the life of your pool systems. Pricing from $35 to $300.

cards.title: Backyard Improvement Sales
cards.description: Upgrade your outdoor living space with BBQ grills, patio furniture, fire pits, pool heaters, and umbrellas. We source and deliver it all.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Give us a quick call or fill out the form. We will visit your property, assess your pool, and deliver an honest quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Jesse and the Blue Pelican team arrive on schedule every week. We clean, balance, inspect, and send you a detailed report with photos and chemical readings when we are done.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready while you spend your weekends doing what matters most — enjoying time with family. If anything is off, we come back and fix it free.

about.label: Why Families Choose Us
about.headline: We Are Not Just a Pool Company — We Are Your Neighbors
about.description: Blue Pelican Pools is a family-owned business built by Jesse Warner right here in Murrieta. We know that your pool is where birthdays happen, where kids learn to swim, and where you unwind after a long week. That is why we treat every pool like it is our own — with honest pricing, reliable weekly service, and full transparency after every visit.

features.title: Photo Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You will never wonder what happened at your pool. Every service includes a detailed email with chemical readings, photos, and a summary of work completed.

features.title: No Contracts. No Hidden Fees.
features.description: We earn your business every single week. Fair pricing up front, no long-term commitments, and no surprise charges on your bill.

features.title: Gate Security Checks Included
features.description: After every service visit, we verify your backyard gates are secure. Your family's safety matters just as much as your water quality.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent pool care plans for Murrieta and surrounding communities. No contracts — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Service Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no additional charge. We do not believe in fine print or excuses — just clean pools and happy families. That is the Blue Pelican promise.

faqs.question: How soon can Blue Pelican start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers in Murrieta, Temecula, and surrounding areas are scheduled within 3 to 5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer next-day response. Just give us a call.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during my pool service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our customers provide gate access and go about their day. After every visit, you receive a detailed email report with photos and chemical readings so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What is included in the weekly service?
faqs.answer: Every weekly visit includes chemical balancing, brushing walls and steps, surface skimming, vacuuming, equipment inspection, and a gate security check. You also receive a full service report with photos after every visit.

faqs.question: Are there contracts or cancellation fees?
faqs.answer: Never. Blue Pelican Pools does not do contracts. We earn your business every week with reliable service and fair pricing. Cancel anytime with zero fees and zero guilt.

faqs.question: What areas does Blue Pelican Pools serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Murrieta, Temecula, Winchester, Wildomar, and French Valley in Southern California. If you are nearby and not sure, give us a call and we will let you know.

testimonials.name: Jesse's Customer
testimonials.text: Jesse is super accommodating and all about forming a relationship with his customers first and setting a price last. He truly cares about providing great service.

testimonials.name: Pool Renovation Client
testimonials.text: The team acid washed our 13-foot deep pool, repaired a structural crack, cleaned the filter, and refilled the pool. It looks BEAUTIFUL! Could not be happier with the results.

testimonials.name: Weekly Service Customer
testimonials.text: It has been great working with Blue Pelican Pools. Jesse knows his stuff! Our pool stays immaculate with on-time maintenance every single week.
